name: Boston Creme Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Prepared Vanilla Pudding (package, frozen, or homemade)
recipeInstructions:
Cream together sugar and shortening until light and fluffy. Beat in egg. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; add alternately with milk and vanilla to creamed mixture. Pour into greased and floured 9-inch round cake pan. Bake in a 350°F oven for 25 minutes. Remove from pan and cool on rack. When cooled, cut cake into two layers. Spread bottom layer with pudding. Top with second layer. Pour Chocolate Glaze over top, allowing some to drizzle down the sides.
Chocolate Glaze: Melt 1/4 cup chocolate pieces with one tablespoon butter or margarine. Remove from heat and stir in 1/2 cup (unsifted) C&H Powdered Sugar alternately with 1 1/2 tablespoons milk. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
